description: Baseline run failed: benchmarks dependencies missing in benchmarks/node_modules (missing tiktoken/tsx resolution).
Second baseline attempt still crashes with missing benchmarks/node_modules dependency resolution for tiktoken.
Harness test with pnpm --filter benchmarks bench returned immediately with no matched projects; invalid benchmark command.
Baseline for react-lang build runtime using pnpm --dir packages/react-lang build via autoresearch.sh.

name: Optimize OpenUI Lang token efficiency without fidelity loss

description: Switched target to token efficiency baseline, but benchmark runner crashes because benchmarks/node_modules is missing and tiktoken cannot be resolved.
Tried to install benchmark deps with pnpm filter, but workspace filter matched no projects; benchmark still crashes resolving tiktoken.
Attempted local benchmarks install; failed because benchmarks depends on workspace:* packages but benchmarks is outside pnpm-workspace, so tiktoken remains unresolved.
Added benchmarks/ to pnpm-workspace and installed benchmark deps, enabling first valid token-efficiency baseline run (OpenUI total tokens = 4800).
Added deterministic OpenUI compaction pass that rewrites .oui samples into schema-ordered inline form and verifies parse-tree fidelity; benchmark total dropped from 4800 to 3261 tokens.
Extended parser with deterministic compact component aliases and updated compaction serializer to emit aliases while preserving canonical parse output; reduced OpenUI total tokens from 3261 to 3167.
